title: FST tracing asserts at runtime with `Assertion `hierarchicalName.rfind(' ') != std::string::npos` if top level module is nameless

features.name: module instantiation with empty name string causing FST trace assertion
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the module name is an empty string, which triggers an assertion in FST tracing when the tracer expects hierarchical path separators
features.snippet:
module top(); endmodule
// Instantiation with empty name: top_tb dut("");
